tagline: This website is a Jojo's reference
aboutBody:
I'm an artist working between traditional sketching as well as digital illustrations. My work reflects all my intrests in manga, anime and games— Jojo's Bizzare Adventures, Bleach, Gurren Lagann, Dragon Ball Z for animaga, Pokemon, Super Mario, Sonic, Undertale for games— and I can keep going on. Every piece is made while listening to Vocaloid and J-Pop music. This site is a living archive of finished pieces, experiments, and works in progress.

Open to commissions and collaborations.
heroStatement: Just an artist who loves sketching stuff
metaDescription: My art sucks, and so do I
